# Global minimum version constraints for uv pip compile --constraints.
# Applied to all images during: make refresh-lock-files
#
# See dependencies/README.md for format rules and branch policy.

# --- CVE-motivated floors ---

# RHAIENG-5303: CVE-2026-44431 urllib3 information disclosure via cross-origin redirects
urllib3>=2.7.0
# RHAIENG-2893: CVE-2026-0897 Keras denial of service via crafted HDF5 weight loading file
keras>=3.13.1
# RHAIENG-3210: CVE-2026-40192 Pillow FITS GZIP decompression bomb
pillow>=12.2.0
# RHAIENG-4890: CVE-2026-42557 JupyterLab HTML command injection
jupyterlab>=4.5.7
# RHAIENG-3644: CVE-2026-0846 NLTK arbitrary file read via improper path validation
nltk>=3.9.3
# RHAIENG-5355: CVE-2026-48710 Starlette security restriction bypass via malformed HTTP Host header
starlette>=1.3.1
# RHAIENG-5461: CVE-2026-2614 mlflow arbitrary file read via bypassed source path validation
mlflow>=3.10.0

# --- General floors ---
